title: MU Stock Breaks $800 as Memory Demand Surges – $1,000 Next or Down to $500?
text: Micron Technology's stock surged to record highs, breaking through the $800 mark as investors capitalized on robust demand for memory chips. The article indicates that while rising valuations and cyclical risks are starting to dampen mood, the semiconductor company has benefited from strong market enthusiasm surrounding memory chip demand. The headline poses the critical question facing traders: whether MU will continue rallying toward $1,000 or face a significant correction back to $500—reflecting the considerable uncertainty about the stock's valuation at current levels despite the positive momentum from sector tailwinds.
